name: shared-build-scripts
description: Single source of truth for the digitalnsw shared build tooling: commit/branch/PR scripts, commitlint + release configs, and reusable GitHub workflows. Changes here are synced out to consumer repos as pull requests.

scripts.snyk:check: bash -lc 'npm exec --yes --package snyk@latest -- snyk test --all-projects --exclude=fixtures,.next --json-file-output=snyk-analysis.json; code=$?; if [ $code -eq 0 ] || [ $code -eq 1 ]; then exit 0; fi; exit $code'
